pages.rationale: The home accurately exposes readiness, recommended prior and next courses, six system milestones, a course-specific causal trace, an effective start action, explicit fixture/external-run boundaries, and the 15 Jul 2026 review date. Three claim-linked reading cards now directly support the family taxonomy, DDPM mechanism, and original-experiment evidence contract, each naming what the learner should verify rather than acting as a generic bibliography.

The page traces normalized categorical mass and u=0.73 sampling, distinguishes density/sampling/conditioning/evaluation, gates predictions before locally checked transfer, and bounds the fixture with a direct generative-model source.
Likelihood, NLL, empirical cross-entropy, nats/bits, masks, and event-space comparability are now taught explicitly; the 0.612-nat soft-target trace and one-hot check are correct and prediction-led.

Seeded inverse-CDF and ancestral sampling are traced with explicit draws, while debugging replay is separated from independent-seed evidence through diagnostic lab cases, deterministic transfer, retries, and scoped sources.

Forward/reverse KL arithmetic, support-zero behavior, JS and Wasserstein decision properties, argument order, estimator limits, and changed-support transfer are accurate, concrete, locally checked, and source-bounded.

The complete composed capstone teaches exact versus stochastic tests, rare-mode miss probability, a 20-seed paired sample-count intervention, and an executable local mechanism starter. The canonical artifact contains all 40 seed/count cells, labels planned versus fixture evidence honestly, and supplies bounded decisions, retries, rubric, and direct sources.

The corrected shifted-input trace establishes that all four logits remain invariant when only target x4 differs; factorization, serialization bias, causal leakage, code assertion, transfer feedback, and source scope now agree.

Prior, likelihood, marginal, posterior, generation, inference, latent-use intervention, and non-identifiability are progressively taught with the correct 0.643 posterior, prediction gates, changed-case feedback, and foundational sources.

The ELBO identity, inference gap, reparameterized gradient path, beta weighting boundary, numerical term ledger, transfer diagnosis, runnable fixture, and primary VAE source form a complete and accurate learning loop.

Posterior collapse is diagnosed with KL plus causal latent swaps rather than thresholds alone; active-unit arithmetic, mitigation trade-offs, changed-case feedback, retries, and evidence boundaries are explicit and accurate.

The end-to-end VAE build contract, one-batch and resume gates, collapse intervention, three-seed by two-treatment matrix, prediction-led checks, executable deterministic starter, project rubric, and VAE/reproducibility sources thoroughly support both objectives without pretending that planned neural training ran.

The inverse map, absolute Jacobian, support transformation, normalization, singular/non-invertible boundaries, scale-4 calculation, interactive cases, deterministic transfer, and Real NVP/source reading are coherent and complete.

Forward, inverse, and log-determinant contracts; connected-support expressivity; coupling arithmetic; round-trip code; diagnostic feedback; and direct Real NVP provenance are complete. The repaired stability trace correctly states that float32 exp(90) overflows to positive infinity and that later arithmetic may then produce NaN, treating either as a failed finite-value gate.

Energy normalization, partition function, positive/negative phases, hidden pockets, finite-table arithmetic, sampler-coupled failure diagnosis, locally checked transfer, runnable stable normalization, and primary sources are complete.

The page now teaches invariant distributions, irreducibility, aperiodicity, ULA bias, MALA correction, mixing diagnostics, and limitations; the stationary two-state trace and alpha=0.779 rejection arithmetic recalculate correctly.

The page builds separate flow and EBM contracts, preserves family-specific diagnostics, and compares quality against explicit primitive budgets. Its executable starter passes, while the canonical artifact contains the flow cell and exact EBM 20/100/500-gradient-evaluation cells, all labeled planned rather than measured.

Forward corruption, schedule/SNR roles, fixed versus learned processes, scalar coefficient arithmetic, uncertainty, a causal schedule/SNR lab with explanation before mechanism reveal, deterministic transfer, runnable code, and DDPM/score sources thoroughly teach the concept.

Analytic scores and denoising score matching are now both explicit: the conditional target, weighted loss, +2 target, .36 error, .09 weighted value, sign failure, code, transfer, and primary source all agree.

The epsilon-prediction row correctly connects x0, timestep, noise, xt, prediction and MSE; target-parameterization comparisons, timestep ambiguity, prediction gates, changed-case feedback, code, limitations, and DDPM provenance are complete.

The repaired page traces x_t to x0-hat=1.775 and deterministic x_prev=1.205, counts five evaluations, distinguishes eta/spacing/calls, pairs starts, and supplies causal lab cases, transfer, code assertions, and DDPM/DDIM sources.

The pipeline, algebra and resume gates, executable mechanism starter, paired sampler design, diagnostic feedback, and DDPM/DDIM provenance are complete. The narrative, objective coverage, project, and artifact now agree on 32 canonical starting-noise tensors and a fully enumerated 64-row baseline/treatment matrix, with quality explicitly unmeasured until reviewed execution.

Condition tensor shapes, mechanisms, counterfactual swaps, adherence/diversity/fidelity separation, ambiguity policy, paired lab controls, deterministic feedback, runnable toy interface, limitations, and sources form a complete lesson.

The declared CFG convention is explicit; w=0/1/>1 behavior and extrapolated arithmetic are correct, while scale selection uses paired multi-metric gates, diagnostic transfer, runnable code, limitations, and the primary paper.

The measurement operator, likelihood/prior posterior, null space, noiseless consistency, underdetermination, hallucination boundary, masked-value trace, local residual code, changed-case feedback, and sources thoroughly teach inverse generation.

The declared composition-gap formula and 0.18 calculation are correct; marginal versus joint control, factorial design, conflicts, held-out combinations, diagnostic matrix, Boolean code, transfer, limitations, and sources are complete.

The page teaches a condition-by-scale-by-seed audit, non-compensable privacy authority, conflict handling, retries, and reversible decisions. Its starter executes and the canonical artifact preserves all 120 planned cells plus separate hand-authored decision fixtures with an explicit no-model-execution boundary.

Throughput, memory, provenance, and resume are now separate evidence contracts; the 3.2/4.8 GB ledger, 50,000 pixels/s rate, checkpoint state, immutable snapshot, lab classifiers, code assertions, retries, and official sources agree.

Threat model, membership, rarity, canaries, query budgets, train/held-out baselines, scoped null results, deterministic nearest-neighbor code, failure-specific feedback, transfer, privacy limits, and primary extraction evidence are complete.

Constructs, budget units, paired cases, uncertainty, Pareto reasoning, 50x model-call arithmetic, hardware/system confounds, interactive cases, deterministic transfer, runnable ledger, boundaries, and source provenance are complete.

The page supplies pinned install, smoke, and full commands; exact 1,600/1,536,000 training-example budgets; separate 20/100 batched invocations and 2,560/409,600 per-example denoiser evaluations; paired seeds; stop rules; diagnostics; providers; and a public runbook. The generated dossier contract now preserves repository revision, runner hash, resolved accelerator, dependencies, all seed rows, and an explicit honest checkpoint/resume status, while refusing to invent a quality band or schedule winner.

The final page connects baseline acceptance to one matched intervention, all five paired seed rows, uncertainty, NaN/failure retention, null-result reporting, and a falsifying next experiment. The executable starter, bounded deterministic reference, staged project, retry logic, rubric, and reproducibility sources make the research workflow independently actionable.

grader.method: Independent 16 July 2026 semantic regression-impact regrade of all 31 composed Generative Models pages after shared objective, instruction, and interaction changes; verified single-placement objectives, immediately visible labs, explanation-before-mechanism flow, assessment integrity, and every rubric floor.
